title: impatiens margaritifera var. humilis
intro: Impatiens margaritifera var. humilis, also known as the 'Balsam Touch-Me-Not', is a variety of the Impatiens margaritifera plant, a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Impatiens margaritifera var. humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats, and provide relief from digestive issues. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
